steps.title: Find the actual side distance
steps.content:
On the original map, $1$ inch represents $18$ miles and the side length is $40$ inches. The actual distance represented by one side is
$$
40\cdot 18=720
$$
miles.

steps.title: Find the smaller side length
steps.content:
The smaller map is $60\%$ shorter, so it keeps $40\%$ of the original side length:
$$
0.40\cdot 40=16
$$
inches.

steps.title: Compute the new scale
steps.content: The same $720$ miles are represented by $16$ inches, so each inch represents $$ \frac{720}{16}=45 $$ miles. The answer is D.
